drl:
rule "R0"
salience -7
agenda-group "ga"
when
    ( T2() and not T1(f0 != "b", f0 contains "l", !(f0 contains "b" || f1 != false)) )
    or
    ( T2() and not T1(f0 != "b", f1 in (true, false, false), !(f0 contains "b" || f1 != false)) )
then
    insertLogical(new T3(2, 2.5, "a"));
    insertLogical(new T3(100, 4.5, ""));
end
rule "R1"
when
    T2()
    not T1(f0 != "b", f0 contains "l", !(f0 contains "b" || f1 != false))
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
    insertLogical(new T3(-2, 1.0, "beta"));
end
rule "R2"
when
    T3(f1 < 4.0, $b2_0_0 : f0, $b2_0_1 : f2)
then
end
rule "R3"
salience 2
when
    $p3_0 : T0(f2 == false)
then
    insert(new T2($p3_0.isF2(), $p3_0.isF2()));
    modify($p3_0) { setF2(true), setF0($p3_0.getF0()) }
end
rule "R4"
when
    T1()
then
end
